title: erigeron cuatrocienegensis
intro: Erigeron cuatrocienegensis, also known as Four-Cornered Fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its small white or pink flowers and hairy stems. The medicinal properties of Erigeron cuatrocienegensis lie in its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include relief from coughs and colds, as well as the potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, Erigeron cuatrocienegensis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat respiratory issues and soothe digestive problems.
